overview: Frost Skeleton Archer is a Normal-class Undead monster found in Ice Abyss, Ice Cavern. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 0 HP, 12 physical damage, 100 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 4. 5 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Melee Attack1 at 320% ratio (384 base damage). Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilityy: Firing Multishot.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 4 melee attacks. Firing Attack (200%), Firing Combo (200%), Melee Attack1 (320%), and more.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Fire, Divine, Earth
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Fire (-2500), Divine (-2000), Earth (-3000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Highest Damage: Melee Attack1 (320% ratio)
strategies.description: Melee Attack1 deals 384 damage at base (320% ratio). This is the most dangerous attack to avoid.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Firing Multishot
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 1 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Firing Multishot. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 200 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster
Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilities: Firing Multishot

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
